positive: A stylized, symmetrical emblem design featuring intertwined bioluminescent flora and celestial elements. Center composition focuses on a sacred geometry mandala composed of detailed vine work, crescent moons, stars, and stylized mythical leaves. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with sacred geometry, rendered with thick, clean linework and high contrast. Color palette is deep indigo, vibrant cyan, electric violet, and glowing gold accents. The composition must maintain strong silhouette integrity for apparel printing, looking excellent as a repeating or single central motif. Flat graphic design, isolated on a clean white background.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, graffiti, photography, realism, solid color fill
